discovery.name: AP_SUPPLIER_SITE_BU
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT sv.vendor_name AS VNAME, sv.segment1 AS VNUM, ss.vendor_site_code AS SITE, ss.prc_bu_id AS BUID, bu.bu_name AS BUNAME, bu.primary_ledger_id AS LEDGERID FROM poz_supplier_sites_all_m ss JOIN poz_suppliers_v sv ON sv.vendor_id = ss.vendor_id JOIN fun_all_business_units_v bu ON bu.bu_id = ss.prc_bu_id WHERE ss.pay_site_flag = 'Y' AND bu.primary_ledger_id IS NOT NULL AND bu.bu_name = 'US1 Business Unit' AND NVL(ss.inactive_date, SYSDATE+1) > SYSDATE AND REGEXP_LIKE(sv.segment1, '^[0-9]+$') AND sv.vendor_name NOT LIKE '%RT %' AND sv.vendor_name NOT LIKE '%RT-%' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(sv.segment1)) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

base_read.sql: SELECT invoice_num AS INVOICE_NUM, invoice_id AS INVOICE_ID, invoice_amount AS INVOICE_AMOUNT FROM ap_invoices_all WHERE invoice_num LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-APINV-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT h.invoice_num AS INVOICE_NUM, h.invoice_id AS IFACE_INVOICE_ID, (SELECT LISTAGG(NVL(r.rejection_message, r.reject_lookup_code), '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.reject_lookup_code) FROM ap_interface_rejections r WHERE r.parent_id = h.invoice_id AND r.parent_table = 'AP_INVOICES_INTERFACE') AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM ap_invoices_interface h WHERE h.load_request_id = :LRID
